questions.question: Disproportionation reaction is a reaction where same species is ______ and ______.

options.B: Liquid, Gas

questions.question: Electrolysis of brine (aq. NaCl) gives ______ at cathode and ______ at anode.

options.B: H2, Cl2

questions.question: Quantity of electricity needed to reduce 1 mole of MnO4- to Mn2+ is ______ Faradays.
Concentration cells have same electrodes but different ______.

options.B: Electrolyte concentrations

questions.question: Auto-oxidation potential? No. Replaced: Fuel cells have efficiency around ______.

options.B: 70% or more

questions.question: Strictly predict the correct statement regarding Electrochemistry Redox: According to Kohlrausch's law of independent migration of ions, the limiting molar conductivity of an electrolyte is equal to: [Variant 2-3]

options.A: The sum of the individual contributions of the anion and cation of the electrolyte
options.B: The product of the specific conductivities
options.C: The difference between cation and anion mobilities
